name: Sun-Dried Tomato Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the tomatoes in boiling water for 2 minutes.
2. Drain and reserve the water.
3. In a mini processor, combine the tomatoes, 2 tablespoons of reserved soaking liquid, anchovies, and garlic. Process until finely chopped.
4. Add lemon juice, olive oil, soy sauce, and pepper. Process until blended.
5. Stir in an additional 2 tablespoons of the reserved soaking liquid.
6. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
